10586278.title: Wives With Knives
10586278.description: Edna Wilson's reunion with a high-school flame leads to a whirlwind romance and marriage, then jealousy rips the relationship apart, and it ends in a fierce battle of wills.

10610341.title: Wives With Knives
10610341.description: Transgender woman Terri Pearson is forced to fight for her life after finding romance with a man who abuses her.

10634034.title: Wives With Knives
10634034.description: Debra Hudson dedicates herself to helping others, then a volatile relationship causes her own addictions to resurface with a vengeance.

10658366.title: Wives With Knives
10658366.description: Karen Miller's new romance with a co-worker is fuelled by alcohol and abuse, then she is forced to defend herself against him by plunging a knife into his neck.
